CustomField.formula: IF(ISBLANK(HomePhone), "", HYPERLINK("tel:" & HomePhone, IF(LEFT(HomePhone, 3) = "+55", IF(LEN(HomePhone) = 14, "+55 (" & MID(HomePhone, 4, 2) & ") " & MID(HomePhone, 6, 5) & "-" & MID(HomePhone, 11, 4), IF(LEN(HomePhone) = 13, "+55 (" & MID(HomePhone, 4, 2) & ") " & MID(HomePhone, 6, 4) & "-" & MID(HomePhone, 10, 4), HomePhone)), HomePhone)) & " " & HYPERLINK("https://wa.me/" & SUBSTITUTE(HomePhone, "+", ""), IMAGE("/resource/WhatsAppIcon", "WhatsApp", 20, 20)))
CustomField.label: Telefone Residencial (exibição)
